name: El Indio Maya Joyeria
description_short: El Indio Maya Joyeria is a jewelry retailer and pawn shop located in Miami, FL, offering jewelry sales, buying, and collateral-based lending services.
description_long: El Indio Maya Joyeria operates as a jewelry retailer and pawn shop in the Allapattah neighborhood of Miami, Florida, serving the local community with extended hours throughout the week. The business is positioned in a retail shopping district and maintains a physical storefront at 2851 NW 7th St, Miami, FL 33125, making it accessible to walk-in customers. Like traditional pawn shops, the business model centers on jewelry retail sales combined with collateral-based lending services, allowing customers to either purchase jewelry or use jewelry and other valuables as collateral for quick cash loans. The company operates on a consistent schedule, opening at 9:00 AM on weekdays and Saturdays, 10:00 AM on Sundays, and closing between 6:00 PM and 8:00 PM depending on the day, providing flexibility for working customers. El Indio Maya Joyeria distinguishes itself through its focus on jewelry specifically—both as a retail product and as collateral—rather than the broader range of items typical pawn shops accept. The business name references Mayan heritage, suggesting cultural relevance to its Miami customer base. However, the available website information is limited to basic business directory data; deeper details about loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, or specific jewelry inventory are not provided in the source material. For consumers seeking quick collateral-based lending against jewelry or gold, this pawn shop offers a local alternative to larger national chains, though competitive comparison would require direct contact with the business.
pros: Extended weekday hours (9 AM - 8 PM) accommodate working customers
Open 7 days a week including Sunday, providing consistent accessibility
Located in a walkable retail shopping district in Miami
Specialized focus on jewelry retail and pawn services suggests expertise in jewelry valuation
Listed as 'Open now' on directory, indicating active business operations
Established local presence at fixed physical address serving Miami community
cons: Website provides no details on loan terms, APR, or interest rates
No information about redemption periods or pawn policies available
Limited online presence beyond directory listing—no company website or detailed service descriptions
No reviews or customer feedback visible on the provided listing
No clarity on what items beyond jewelry the shop accepts as collateral
best_for: Miami-area residents needing quick cash against jewelry or gold collateral
Customers seeking local jewelry purchases from a neighborhood retailer
Spanish-speaking or culturally-aligned customers in the Allapattah area
diagnosis: El Indio Maya Joyeria is best for Miami residents needing rapid collateral-based loans using jewelry or gold as security, or for those seeking jewelry retail purchases from a locally-established shop. The main caveat is the complete absence of published loan terms, APR, redemption policies, or online information—customers must visit in person or call to understand actual rates and conditions before pawning items.
services: Quick cash loans secured by jewelry collateral
In-person customer service at physical storefront
